MissionItem.title: MissionItem
MissionItem.description: An item containing details of name, reason of being, learn, go, and coding objectives.

createdAt.description: Epoch timestamp when the item was created

EternalMemory.title: EternalMemory
EternalMemory.description: An eternal memory ledger block containing user notes, project evolution logs, and historical concepts for persistent recall.

id.description: Unique identifier of the memory block

content.description: Long-form content, note, or logs of the memory

blockSignature.description: Cryptographic signature of the memory block

CellularState.title: CellularState
CellularState.description: A saved cellular simulation snapshot with user notes, grid configuration, and biological logs.

name.description: The name or note of the cellular state snapshot

cellsJson.description: JSON string of the active CellNode list with generation and metrics

phase.description: The active quantum cycle phase at snapshot

/mission_items/{itemId}.description: Collection of mission-critical items containing name, reason of being, learn, go, and coding information.

/eternal_memories/{memoryId}.description: Collection of eternalized user notes, project logs, and historical concepts.

/cellular_states/{stateId}.description: Collection of saved cellular grid states.
